name: Divide the Clock by Faith
text:
Divide the number of doom counters on the Doomsday Clock by your faith. Your faith is zero. You did the math. You should not have done the math.
The Doomsday Clock now reads undefined. While the Doomsday Clock reads undefined, it is both midnight and the dawn of time, and the rules committee has stopped returning calls.
Draw a number of cards equal to undefined. (Stop when you feel a presence.)
this effect is left as an exercise for the reader, who is now part of the prophecy.
flavorText: "And lo, they divided by zero, and the heavens threw an exception."
